case.title: TIFFANY FINE ARTS, INC. v. U.S.

opinion.h: TIFFANY FINE ARTS, INC. v. U.S. , 466 U.S. 925 (1984)
TIFFANY FINE ARTS, INC., et al., petitioners, v. UNITED STATES, et al No. 83-1007
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Court of Appeals for the Second Circuit.
Granted.[ Tiffany Fine Arts, Inc. v. U.S. 466 U.S. 925 (1984) ]
